CD4 Lymphocyte Count

CD4 Lymphocyte Count 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a CD4 count? 
A CD4 count is a blood test that measures the number of CD4 cells in a sample of your blood. CD4 cells are a type of white blood cell that circulates throughout the body in the blood. They're also called CD4 T lymphocytes or "helper T cells." That's because they help fight infection by triggering your immune system Â to destroy viruses, bacteria, a
